name: kiln-preference-judge-orchestrator
description: Opus-as-teacher pairwise preference labeler for Kiln's preference-judge distillation. The agent itself (Opus 4.7) judges which of two completions (A vs B) better matches a user's writing voice, writes output to the container, and emits the labeled JSONL back to the caller via an agent message. Pilot: 500 pairs; full run: 5,000.
